heroDescription: Nano-modified asphalt binder solutions engineered for durable, climate-resilient infrastructure in Canada and future export markets.
productCategoriesDescription: Bitumpro's launch focus is Nano Polymer Modified Bitumen (Nano PMB), a next-generation asphalt binder combining polymer and nano-additive technology. Our scalable BC facility is also designed to support future Nano Bitumen Emulsion and Nano Asphalt Sealer product lines as market demand grows.
completeProductRangeDescription: Explore our focused product roadmap for high-performance road construction, pavement preservation, cold mix applications, waterproofing, and climate-resilient infrastructure.
bitumenDescription: Our flagship Nano PMB uses advanced polymer and nano-additive technology to improve rutting resistance, cracking resistance, elasticity, thermal stability, oxidation resistance, and pavement service life.
hydrocarbonDescription: Future-ready emulsion products planned for urban resurfacing, pavement preservation, cold mix applications, and infrastructure maintenance programs.
oilMulchDescription: Planned nano-enhanced asphalt sealers for waterproofing, surface protection, pavement preservation, and reduced long-term maintenance cycles.
qualityAssuranceDescription: Bitumpro will support product adoption through controlled production, QC laboratory testing, technical documentation, pilot batches, and alignment with ASTM, CSA, and provincial transportation requirements.
isoCertified: 2,000 m² BC facility with scalable 6,000-ton annual design capacity
laboratoryServices: QC laboratory, R&D, pilot batches, and technical field support
internationalDistribution: Canada launch with U.S. and South America export roadmap
readyToGetStartedDescription: Our team is ready to provide technical guidance, product specifications, pilot project support, pricing, and commercial consultation for municipalities, highway contractors, asphalt plants, and infrastructure developers.
